archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Industrial SCADA/HMI
vibe: Dark industrial control room. High information density. Functional over beautiful. SCADA/HMI interface.

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL data, metrics, IP addresses, table values, and numerical outputs.
Use Inter for UI labels, headers, button text, and navigational elements.
Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing.
1px solid borders (`border-[#2a3b55]`), no heavy shadows, no glassmorphism, no gradients.
Every pixel conveys status or data. Optical alignment is key.

tables.styling: Alternating row backgrounds (#1a1a2e / #16213e), no standard zebra striping.
tables.typography: Monospace used for IP addresses and metrics.

status_indicators.style: Small LED-style dots next to device names.
status_indicators.rule: Do NOT use colored background badges for status. Just the LED dot.

topology_viewer.canvas: Dark canvas with faint grid background pattern (very faint #252a40 dots).
topology_viewer.interactions: Nodes have subtle glow when selected. Click node for side panel details.

animations: Minimal. Use micro-interactions for feedback. No bouncy or decorative animations.
testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="alert-acknowledge-button"`).

image_urls.description: Modern server room with blue illumination. Use sparingly for empty states or deep background texture at <10% opacity if absolutely necessary. Primary UI must remain flat #1a1a2e.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React with Vite/Webpack using JavaScript (.jsx / .js). DO NOT USE .tsx files per the critical rules, despite earlier TS mentions.
Configure Tailwind with the exact colors provided in this JSON.
Implement the fixed left collapsible sidebar with line-icons.
Build the dashboard with summary KPI cards (total devices, online count, critical alerts, network health score).
Build the live alert feed panel and Alerts page with severity colors and acknowledge buttons.
Build the Device inventory table (add/edit/delete) using the exact 40px row height and alternating backgrounds (#1a1a2e and #16213e).
Implement Cytoscape.js network topology viewer. Ensure shapes map correctly (Switch=rectangle, PLC=hexagon, End Device=circle).
Implement FastAPI backend with MongoDB and a mock data generator (20 realistic devices).
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, links, and actionable elements have a `data-testid` attribute.
